findings.description: PascalCase class names HttpAccessLogHandler and ThreadContextHandler appear in the note at the bottom of s1 (examples of handlers that must be placed after MultipartHandler) but are absent from s1 hints.
findings.source_evidence: 「具体的には、:doc:`HttpAccessLogHandler` を拡張し、特定のリクエストパラメータを出力するケースや、:doc:`ThreadContextHandler` にリクエストパラメータの内容に依存したカスタムの属性を追加するようなケースがこれに該当する。」

findings.description: The fully-qualified class name nablarch.core.util.FilePathSetting appears in the XML configuration example in s3 but is absent from s3 hints. Only the short name FilePathSetting is present.
